comment: ML-DSA-65 KAT subset extracted from NIST ACVP test vectors (FIPS 204). Source: https://github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server/tree/master/gen-val/json-files/ML-DSA-keyGen-FIPS204 and .../ML-DSA-sigGen-FIPS204 — internalProjection.json files. Retrieved via gh API on 2026-04-26 (keygen + sigver) and 2026-04-27 (siggen). keygen_vectors test seed → pk derivation. sigver_vectors test verify-side correctness. siggen_vectors test sign-side correctness: feed NIST's expanded sk (4032 B per FIPS 204) and message+ctx into the deterministic ML-DSA.Sign and assert the resulting 3309-byte signature matches NIST byte-for-byte. Source group is tgId=3 (ML-DSA-65, AFT, deterministic=true, signatureInterface=external, preHash=pure).
source: NIST ACVP-Server (master) ML-DSA-keyGen-FIPS204 and ML-DSA-sigGen-FIPS204 internalProjection.json — first 10 ML-DSA-65 vectors (keygen+sigver) plus 5 smallest-message ML-DSA-65 deterministic external pure sigGen vectors (tgId=3)
